evidence_available: MBK/Young Poong launches 2T won tender at 660,000 won; Korea Zinc +19.8%.
Court rejects attempt to block Korea Zinc buyback; shares +6.4% to 877,000 won.
Teck/Korea Zinc zinc TC falls to $165/t from $274/t.
U.S.-backed Tennessee critical-minerals project reported at $7.4B.
Korea recommends 27.91-38.02% duties on Chinese steel plate; Hyundai Steel +5.8%, POSCO +3.9%.
U.S. steel/aluminum tariff risk hits Korean steel shares.
Hyundai Steel / Hyundai Motor Group $5.8B Louisiana steel plant, 2.7M t/y, 2029 target.
Lotte Chemical 2024 OP loss 895B won and LG Chem OP -63.75%.
Korea approves Daesan restructuring with 1.1M t/y NCC shutdown and up to 2T won support.
SK Innovation expects flat refining margins; shares -2.9% vs KOSPI +0.7%.
Q1 2026 OP recovered to 2.2T won vs 30B loss year earlier.
POSCO buys MinRes lithium stake for $765M; MinRes +10.8%, POSCO direct price unavailable.
China asks Korean firms not to export products using Chinese rare earths to U.S. defense firms.
